name: Minimalist Compact (Developer)
description: A high-density variation of the programmer template designed to fit maximum technical history into a clean, single-page layout.

data.summary: Distributed systems engineer with 6+ years of experience designing fault-tolerant backend pipelines, streaming APIs, and Kubernetes infrastructure.

experience.title: Backend Architect
description: Architected a real-time event streaming pipeline processing 10B+ daily events using Go and Kafka.
Reduced AWS cloud compute expenditures by 28% through custom Kubernetes auto-scaling policies.
Led a team of 4 engineers to rebuild the main authentication gateway with zero downtime.

projects.title: HyperKV — Distributed Key-Value Store
description: Developed an LSM-tree backed distributed key-value store using Raft consensus in Rust.
Achieved 120k write operations/sec with sub-millisecond tail latencies.

achievements: Speaker at GoCon Seattle 2023 — 'Scaling Consensus Protocols'
Main contributor to open-source Raft implementations
